Food & Drink - Marathon Music Works
FOOD PROVIDED BY
Food & Drink
FOOD BY DADDY’S DOGS
Daddy’s Dogs pride themselves on raising the bar for what can be expected from a gourmet hotdog. Starting with 100% all-beef dogs, cooking them in their secret concoction of spices and finish them on the open-flame grill.
Their buns are baked fresh every day in a local bakery, with a recipe created specifically for Dady’s Dogs. Since their meat/bun are such high quality, regular toppings just won’t cut the mustard. They make their own sauces and toppings in house, with unique recipe combinations as well as your favorite regional hotdog traditions. This attention to detail in every dog they make is what has created a supremely loyal fan base and converted many self-professed ‘non-hotdog eaters’ into regulars at their flagship shop in The Nations neighborhood. (Don’t worry, they’ve got dogs for the vegans as well)
See the menu below for what you can order at a show or event. For more info on Daddy’s Dogs visit
DaddysDogsNash.com
.
Host Your Event At Marathon Music Works
RENT MARATHON MUSIC WORKS
With a standing room capacity of 1,500 and over 14,000 sq. ft., Marathon can entertain parties of up to 600 in formal banquet seating, 750 in a theater arrangement, and 900 in cocktail functions. The versatile, open floor design is accented with exposed brick walls, a lofty steel beam ceiling, polished concrete bars, and metal chandeliers your guests will love.
